NHL static analytics for season 2025-2026

Analysis

Larger analysis work: lineup suggestions, penalty analysis, 5v5 xG shot map, and experiments.

Unless otherwise specified empty net goals are excluded from all analysis.

Search Snapshot

Team Coverage

32 team lineup cards are in the current build.

Team xG Coverage

32 teams and 127,182 plotted shots are available after removing 1,313 empty-net shots.

Penalty Analysis Coverage

1312 games and 7,501 advantage penalties feed the current penalty section. Official power-play goals account for 20.0% of all goals in the sample.

PP Development Coverage

The new power-play development section tracks the top 20 PP scorers per minute out of 218 qualified skaters (current threshold: 150.0 PP minutes). Strongest current 5v5 link: 5v5 points / 60 (+0.300).

Analysis Workspace

Line Deployment Lab

Compare current and suggested forward lines, defence pairs, power-play groups, and penalty-kill groups without stacking those cards on top of the main rankings tables.

Team xG Visualizer

Inspect shot locations, expected goals, and goal overlays team by team with a threshold slider so heavier datasets stay usable.

Penalty Impact Lab

Measure how often penalties turn into goals, compare four different definitions of when the power play really ends, and look at taken-vs-drawn profiles by player role.

PP Development Lab

Track who is actually elite on the power play right now, compare them to their 5v5 profile, and follow how those same stars grew into their PP roles over career opportunity.

Line Analysis

Search teams normally or select up to two teams to compare side by side.
